word: H6877 - צְרִיחַ - tsᵉrîyach - tser-ee'-akh - High place

sections.paragraph:
Original: צריח

Transliteration: tserı̂yach

Phonetic: tser-ee'-akh

BDB Definition:

  1. excavation, underground chamber, cellar, underground room
    1. meaning uncertain

Origin: from H6873 in the sense of clearness of vision

TWOT entry: 1969a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
